channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Summer 2026 Meal Plans
item.description: Purchase your Summer 2026 Meal Plan today to enjoy all you care to eat dining at Commons Dining Hall and Flex Dollars to use at Panera and Fathers this summer. For more information on available plans and how to order please click the link above.
item.author: Students

item.title: Summer 2026 TA Office Hours
item.description: Wednesdays : 3-8pm (Ballroom, Student Union) Need some support with your summer classes? Drop by your TA’s office hours in the Student Union for extra help, then recharge with fun mental floss activities from the Center of Gravity!
item.author: Students

item.title: Removal of Unused Webex Recordings
item.description: With the close of the spring semester, all members of the RPI community are asked to review any recordings stored in Webex and delete those which are no longer needed. Everyone has a quota allotted for storage in Webex, and exceeding that quota may result in being unable to record to the cloud. Please submit a support request with any questions; Multimedia Services would be happy to assist: https://itssc.rpi.edu/hc/en-us/requests/new?ticket_form_id=12539963570701
item.author: Community

item.title: East Side Elevated Walkway Closure – Alternate Pedestrian Routes
item.description: Starting May 18, PCC Contracting will begin mobilization and site setup for the RPI East Side Elevated Walkway Project. The elevated walkway and underpass between the Darrin Communications Center (DCC) and Jonsson Engineering Center (JEC) will close on May 20 through the summer, with intermittent impacts anticipated into the fall semester. Alternate pedestrian routes have been established, and wayfinding signage will be installed as construction progresses.
item.author: Community

item.title: Memorial Day Weekend Dining Hours
item.description: Dining and Retail Hours of Operations will vary for the upcoming Memorial Day Weekend Holiday. Please click the link above for all the details. Thank you and enjoy your Memorial Day Weekend!
item.author: Community

item.title: Join HR Virtual Office Hours - RPI MAX Annual Performance Evaluations
item.description: Human Resources invites managers and staff to attend upcoming Virtual HR Office Hours to answer questions regarding the RPI MAX Annual Staff Performance Evaluation process. Stop in for help with PageUp navigation, the evaluation process, timelines, and related topics. We look forward to connecting with you!
item.author: Faculty and Staff

item.title: Spring 2026 End of Term Student Course Evaluations: Reviewing Evaluation Results (Training for Instructors and TAs) Webinar
item.description:
Date: Thursday, May 28, 2026 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM - This webinar is for instructors and TA’s that would like to understand or have a refresher of the various ways to review their student course evaluations in HelioCampus.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
